title: mapania humilis var. petiolata
intro: Mapania humilis var. petiolata, also known as a type of sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Mapania humilis var. petiolata include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas and tonics that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
